title: Bin Sorting
description: Using the same pose-recording and command-replay system from our initial robot arm project, we finalised the pick-and-place movements to sort coloured blocks into their matching bins. Each pose was tuned for consistent grip and release, and the movement sequence was locked in to reliably complete a full sort cycle. Next steps are to integrate IoT connectivity so the mobile robot can trigger the arm automatically as part of a combined pipeline.
